allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add circle about/rules sidebar, bottom nav, profile page, image avatars, and about page

- Add collapsible About/Rules section per circle with Reddit-style desktop sidebar layout
- Replace emoji avatars with image-based avatars \(house, fox, hills, man, roof, woman\)
- Add bottom navigation bar for mobile with circles/feed/profile tabs
- Extract profile page with edit support and about link
- Add About Quiet Network page
- Extend circles schema with about, rules fields and creator update policy
- Add @radix-ui/react-collapsible for collapsible UI primitive

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
